rationale.R1.5: The revised draft proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale for structural reorganization.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for each recommendation and marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) scope, mostly within the requested active set.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression in downstream-harm avoidance.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason for provenance and traceability.
